acceptance_targets: [ch17_f005] PASS if revised lines 181-229 contain at least three explicit Lena thought/sensation/self-assessment beats and no stretch longer than nine consecutive paragraphs without interior access; FAIL otherwise.

[ch17_f006] PASS if the revised chapter uses the "voice + descriptor" attribution pattern no more than twice across the cited spans while preserving speaker clarity; FAIL if the repeated template remains a dominant pattern.

[ch17_f007] PASS if no more than one triadic A/B/C look-order construction remains across lines 33, 179, and 253, and each revised beat conveys a different psychological function; FAIL if three near-identical list-order constructions persist.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines 181-229 contain at least three explicit Lena thought/sensation/self-assessment beats and no stretch longer than nine consecutive paragraphs without interior access; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: During the Hollis confrontation, focalization runs for 10+ consecutive paragraphs with little to no explicit Lena interiority, so the chapter temporarily reads like external camera blocking rather than close-third experience.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert concise Lena interior beats into snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:181-229 at leverage shifts (e.g., after legal challenge, attempted grab, and dispatch interruption) without slowing scene pace.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter uses the "voice + descriptor" attribution pattern no more than twice across the cited spans while preserving speaker clarity; FAIL if the repeated template remains a dominant pattern.
findings.problem: The repeated attribution construction using "voice + descriptor" recurs throughout key exchanges, creating a detectable sentence-shape tic that flattens rhythmic variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary dialogue attribution in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:43-87 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173-309 by substituting selective action beats, cleaner untagged lines, and Lena-anchored perception so the same template does not dominate.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one triadic A/B/C look-order construction remains across lines 33, 179, and 253, and each revised beat conveys a different psychological function; FAIL if three near-identical list-order constructions persist.
findings.problem: A triadic gaze-enumeration formula (A/B/C look-order listing) appears three times, signaling mechanical repetition and reducing descriptive freshness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite at least two of the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:33, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:179, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:253 with distinct syntax tied to each character's intent rather than repeating list-order choreography.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
